title: The Golem's Gambit
description: The golem has been tested with 4 ingredients. Deduce the reaction pattern and identify the target group.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing3: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing7: chest=✗ ears=✓  →  ears_only
  ing1: chest=✓ ears=✗  →  chest_only
  ing5: chest=✗ ears=✗  →  non_reactive
Chest reacts to R+S. Ears react to B+L. An animator needs BOTH. Cross-reference with untested ingredients.
The animators are: ingredients [3, 8]. Alch: ing3→npN, ing8→pnP.
